titles.title: America Grows Act of 2026
America Grows Act of 2026
A bill to prioritize funding for an expanded and sustained national investment in agricultural research.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry.

bill.summary:
America Grows Act of 2026
This bill permanently funds several agencies that perform agriculture research.
The bill provides specified funding for the following agencies within the Department of Agriculture:
the Agricultural Research Service,the Economic Research Service,the National Agricultural Statistics Service, andthe National Institute of Food and Agriculture.The bill exempts the funding from sequestration, which is a process of automatic, usually across-the-board spending reductions under which budgetary resources are permanently cancelled to enforce specific budget policy goals.
It also exempts the budgetary effects of the funding from the Statutory Pay-As-You-Go Act of 2010 (PAYGO) and the Senate PAYGO rule.
